title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: **Prioritized Findings** - `CRITICAL` False PASS in inspection: image conversion failures are non-blocking, so verification can exit `0` with `0 slides verified`. `convertToImages()` returns `null` on LibreOffice/pdftoppm failures, and PASS/FAIL is decided only by `HIGH` text issues. Evidence: [verify-slides.js#L134](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L134), [verify-slides.js#L151](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L151), [verify-slides.js#L235](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L235), [verify-slides.js#L270](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L270). - `HIGH` Pre-generation QC is advisory only in the main generator: errors are logged but generation continues to create/share. Evidence: [google-slides-generator.js#L936](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L936), [google-slides-generator.js#L937](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L937), [google-slides-generator.js#L955](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/google-slides-generator.js#L955). - `HIGH` Content fallback can silently degrade quality: Manus research failure generates an empty structure and exits success unless strict flags are enabled (default `false`). Evidence: [manus-research.js#L36](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-research.js#L36), [manus-research.js#L456](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-research.js#L456), [manus-research.js#L621](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/manus-research.js#L621). - `HIGH` Spec/implementation drift on exit contract: skill docs require `inspection-report`, `repair-log`, `delivery-gate`, but runtime scripts do not enforce artifact presence before completion. Evidence: [SKILL.md#L87](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L87), [SKILL.md#L89](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L89), [verify-slides.js#L251](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/verify-slides.js#L251). - `MEDIUM` Pptx fallback path can hide hard rendering failures: per-slide renderer exceptions are converted into on-slide error text, but process still exits success. Evidence: [generate-pptx.js#L96](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/generate-pptx.js#L96), [generate-pptx.js#L1003](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/generate-pptx.js#L1003). - `MEDIUM` Repair-loop policy mismatch risks unstable automation: docs state max 3 loops, implementation uses 5 auto-fix iterations; warnings are blocking in post-QC but classification/ownership is ambiguous across layers. Evidence: [agent.md#L154](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/agent.md#L154), [qc-post-generation.js#L55](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L55), [qc-post-generation.js#L901](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-post-generation.js#L901). - `MEDIUM` Single-lane fallback violation risk: policy requires parallel excitation / no silent single-lane downgrade, but I did not find runtime enforcement in exit scripts. Policy evidence: [SKILL.md#L43](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L43), [SKILL.md#L47](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L47), [verify-quality.md#L74](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/verify-quality.md#L74). - `MEDIUM` Test gaps around completion gating: no tests hit `verify-slides` failure modes (LibreOffice/pdftoppm missing, `check-only`, receipt gating), and E2E mainly validates file creation/basic shape. Evidence: [package.json#L7](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/package.json#L7), [test-e2e.js#L156](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-e2e.js#L156), [test-e2e.js#L428](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-e2e.js#L428). **Concrete Guardrails** - Make inspection fail-closed: if PPTX→PDF or PDF→image fails, emit `HIGH` issue and non-zero exit; never PASS with `images.length===0`. - Add hard completion invariants: `slideCount_expected == slideCount_r...
